title: Cannabis market data - Canada.ca
content:
## Cannabis data overview: Inventory, sales and licensed area
Data collected is for these types of cannabis in the legal industry:
Data for all categories includes:
- packaged inventory (formerly finished inventory)
- unpackaged inventory (formerly unfinished inventory)
This update reflects the data reported under the Cannabis Tracking System Order . Data is subject to revision as verification and validation occur on an ongoing basis. Please note that, except in rare instances, Health Canada generally does not make estimates for reporting parties that have not submitted their information into the Cannabis Tracking System.
Additional cannabis data is available on the Cannabis research and data page.
This data, as well as more detailed data on sales and inventories broken down by cannabis product class, is also available on Open Government.
(Total sales up 7% from December 2024)

Total licensed area:
- Indoor growing area: 1,444,879 m 2
- Processing area: 345,151 m 2
- Outdoor growing area: 699 hectares (6,988,400 m 2 )
Health Canada collects data on cannabis under the Cannabis Tracking System Order . The Order came into force on October 17, 2019.
Data collected by Health Canada under the Access to Cannabis for Medical Purposes Regulations (ACMPR) is available in archived format .
You can also access archived data on these pages:
- licensed area and employment
